mapper.sql: select wa.id, wa.user_id, wa.exercise_id, wa.wrong_count, wa.last_wrong_time, wa.create_time, case when wa.exercise_id < 0 then 'lesson' else kp.content_type end as source_type, case when wa.exercise_id < 0 then le.lesson_id else kp.content_id end as source_id, case when wa.exercise_id < 0 then l.title else kp.source_title end as source_title, case when wa.exercise_id < 0 then null else e.knowledge_point_id end as knowledge_point_id, case when wa.exercise_id < 0 then l.title else kp.name end as knowledge_point_name, case when wa.exercise_id < 0 then le.title else e.content end as content, case when wa.exercise_id < 0 then le.exercise_type else e.type end as exercise_type, case when wa.exercise_id < 0 then le.answer else e.answer end as answer_content, case when wa.exercise_id < 0 then le.analysis else e.explanation end as explanation_content from study_wrong_answer wa left join study_exercise e on wa.exercise_id > 0 and e.id = wa.exercise_id left join study_knowledge_point kp on e.knowledge_point_id = kp.id left join study_lesson_exercise le on wa.exercise_id < 0 and le.exercise_id = -wa.exercise_id left join study_lesson l on le.lesson_id = l.lesson_id
mapper.select:
and wa.user_id = #{userId} and ( (wa.exercise_id > 0 and e.id is not null) or (wa.exercise_id < 0 and le.exercise_id is not null) )
and ( (wa.exercise_id < 0 and #{sourceType} = 'lesson') or (wa.exercise_id > 0 and kp.content_type = #{sourceType}) )
and ( (wa.exercise_id < 0 and le.lesson_id = #{sourceId}) or (wa.exercise_id > 0 and kp.content_id = #{sourceId}) )
order by wa.last_wrong_time desc, wa.id desc
mapper.insert:
insert into study_wrong_answer
user_id, exercise_id, wrong_count, last_wrong_time, create_time,
#{userId}, #{exerciseId}, #{wrongCount}, #{lastWrongTime}, #{createTime},
mapper.delete: delete from study_wrong_answer wa where wa.exercise_id is null or (wa.exercise_id > 0 and not exists ( select 1 from study_exercise e where e.id = wa.exercise_id )) or (wa.exercise_id < 0 and not exists ( select 1 from study_lesson_exercise le where le.exercise_id = -wa.exercise_id ))
